upgrade_review.upgrade_delta_one_line: The proposal genuinely generalizes the parent from one treatment-exposure channel to dual instrument/treatment exposure channels with monotone compliance and includes a named parent-corner reduction.

repo_prior_art.cite: parent pid_network_exposure/v1 excluded by upgrade mode; no non-parent PartialID catalogue entry records dual exposure channels with compliance

published_prior_art.cite: hoshino_yanagi_2024_noncompliance_unknown_interference identifies complier effects and IPW under unknown interference; schroder_oprescu_feuerriegel_kallus_2026_networks_partialid gives sharp exposure-misspecification bounds without compliance

repo_prior_art.cite: parent pid_network_exposure/v1 strict shared-completion ADE nonsharpness excluded by upgrade mode; no other non-parent shared-completion network-IV entry found

published_prior_art.cite: none; closest chain is Hoshino-Yanagi 2024 plus Schroder-Oprescu-Feuerriegel-Kallus 2026, neither gives stitched-vs-shared dual-map complier nonrepresentability

novelty_flags.label: Conjecture 1
novelty_flags.one_line: The flagship open-class claim relies on Exhibit 9.1, but the displayed Q_i^D(1|0,s)=1/3 is not derived from the stated five-unit design with one encouraged unit among all five, so the proposal currently lacks a valid non-corner witness.

novelty_flags.label: Conjecture 1
novelty_flags.one_line: The promised stitched-minus-shared gap is computed using a unitwise kernel value that is not obtained from the §6 primitives, so the exhibited constructive object is still promissory.

soundness_flags.label: Theorem 1
soundness_flags.one_line: The weights for R_i^D(G,D) and S_i=s are written as Pr_pi objects even though D is an observed/endogenous take-up vector; the LP variables do not include enough joint take-up structure to determine these treatment-exposure probabilities from pi alone.

soundness_flags.label: Conjecture 1
soundness_flags.one_line: In Exhibit 9.1, under the stated uniform design with exactly one encouraged unit among five, the claimed connected control-arm probability 1/3 does not follow; if conditioning on Z_i=0 it is 1/4, and if conditioning on D_i=0 it is not 1/3 under the displayed take-up cells.

strengthening_paths.suggestion: Replace the Pr_pi treatment-exposure weights with a fully specified observable or structural distribution for the full D vector, and add the missing LP variables or observed-cell probabilities needed to compute R_i^D(G,D).

Recompute Exhibit 9.1 from the stated assignment design and conditioning event, or change the design so the connected-kernel probability really equals the displayed value; then recompute both endpoints.
After the witness is repaired, state the open-class perturbation argument with an explicit margin around the numerical gap rather than only saying small perturbations preserve the sign.

recommended_next_step: Revise the primitive probability model and repair the five-unit witness; without a valid exhibit, the flagship-tier floor is not met.
